chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln. No.D-60 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on M.A. No.470/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 3. For orders on M.A. No.471/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of protective bail. 21.07.2025 Mr. Naeemuddin Chachar, Advocate alongwith applicants. ******** 1. Urgency Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through instant bail application, applicants Ghulam Qadir alias Ghulam son of Mahram Ali and Munawar Ali alias Munwar son of Anwar Ali seek protective bail in Crime No.04/2025 registered at Police Station,Katcho Bindi-II under Sections 365-A, 344, 148, 149 PPC & 7ATA. It is, inter alia, contended that applicants are innocent and have falsely been involved in this case by the Police with malafide intention and ulterior motives. He contended that as soon as applicants came to know they tried to surrender themselves before the concerned Court for pre-arrest bail but applicants have grave apprehension of their malicious arrest before reaching the same at the hands of concerned police hence, they have approached this Court for grant of protective bail. Be that as it may, without touching merits of the case and in order to enable them to appear before concerned Court they are granted protective bail for a period of Seven days commencing from today, subject to furnishing their solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each (Rupees Fifty thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of said period or on appearance of applicants before concerned Court, whichever is earlier.

Be that as it may, without touching merits of the case and in order to enable them to appear before concerned Court they are granted protective bail for a period of Seven days commencing from today, subject to furnishing their solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each (Rupees Fifty thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of said period or on appearance of applicants before concerned Court, whichever is earlier. In case, applicants fail to surrender before the concerned Court within stipulated period, their bail bond shall stand forfeited. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Ihsan/PS.
